#### Special notes for your reviewer

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated `charts/outline/Chart.yaml` version when changing chart behavior.
- [ ] I updated `artifacthub.io/changes` in `charts/outline/Chart.yaml`.
- [ ] I ran `helm lint charts/outline`.
- [ ] I ran `helm unittest --strict --file 'unittests/**/*.yaml' charts/outline`.
- [ ] I considered whether `values.schema.json` needs updates.
